name: jiafang-yifang
description: A public Codex skill for agencies, freelancers, and service providers dealing with client-side scoping, pricing, delivery boundaries, acceptance, and payment collection.

interface.shortDescription: 给乙方用的项目判断与博弈 skill。
interface.longDescription: 面向乙方、顾问、外包团队、自由职业者与小老板。用于处理接单筛选、报价谈判、需求边界、交付验收、回款续约等典型甲乙方问题。
defaultPrompt: 客户一直改需求怎么办？
怎么报价才不会把自己做成耗材？
